summary: Public marketing and pricing pages with product positioning, pricing copy, and authenticated checkout entry points.
responsibilities: Render public product positioning for Diffforge.
Link users toward signin, signup, dashboard-adjacent, and pricing flows.
Keep placeholder workspace, lane, feature, and pricing claims clearly non-authoritative in comments until implemented.
Allow authenticated users to start Pro checkout from the pricing page.
invariants: Placeholder product claims must not be treated as implemented behavior.
Pricing page checkout controls must route through the verified server checkout API.
Marketing links should route only to existing pages or in-page anchors.
